title: Mekanism Ore Borders
description: I couldn't find any Mekanism Ore Borders anywhere else so I decided to make my own :D
body:
Mekanism Ore Borders.

Gives all of Mekanism ores borders to make them easier to see in caves.

Flourite has a trans flag as its border because its almost June and its practically begging to have a trans flag border because of its ore texture.

All other ore get their border from the ore texture 

Borders inspired By [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

Moved to https://www.modrinth.com/resourcepack/modded-ores-borders
